page_metadata.biotools__summary: Is an algorithm to calculate the similarity of topologies of two protein structures. It can be exploited to quantitatively access the quality of protein structure predictions relative to native. Because TM-score weights the close matches stronger than the distant matches, TM-score is more sensitive than root-mean-square deviation (RMSD).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Is an algorithm to calculate the similarity of topologies of two protein structures. It can be exploited to quantitatively access the quality of protein structure predictions relative to native. Because TM-score weights the close matches stronger than the distant matches, TM-score is more sensitive than root-mean-square deviation (RMSD).
